name: Clear Liability — Shop Theft with CCTV Evidence
facts: On 15 August 2024, at approximately 3:45 PM, accused Ravi Kumar entered a mobile phone shop in Bengaluru and, while the shopkeeper was attending to another customer, picked up two smartphones (total value ₹1,10,000) and concealed them inside his bag. The act was captured in full on CCTV. The shopkeeper noticed the theft, raised an alarm, and Ravi Kumar was apprehended at the shop entrance. The stolen phones were recovered from his bag. Ravi Kumar has no prior criminal record. He was produced before the Magistrate and is in judicial custody.

expected.test_label: BNS routing + prosecution wins on clear evidence
